sourceAmbiguity: Redirect URIs could be treated as a flat provider-console list.
decisionTaken: Each redirect is bound to an owning client, route families, PostAuthReturnIntent patterns, and opaque state prefixes.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Phase 2 requires governed return intents instead of arbitrary redirect URLs.
operationalRisk: If removed, operators can add callback sprawl and route-family drift outside the auth bridge.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Revise data/analysis/202_redirect_uri_matrix.csv and rerun pnpm validate:nhs-login-client-config.
